questionHtml:
Which equation represents the deposition of iodine?

A.  I2 (g) → I2 (l)

B.  I2 (g) → I2 (s)

C.  I2 (l) → I2 (g)

D.  I2 (s) → I2 (g)

meta.title: Which equation represents the deposition of iodine? A. I2 (g) → I2 (l) B. I2 (g) → I2 (s) C. I2 (l) → I2 (g) D. I2 (s) → I2 (g)
breadcrumbLabels: 1.1 Introduction to the particulate nature of matter and chemical change
